summary: Both REQ-19 and REQ-20 are partially addressed. REQ-20 (mailto CTA button) is fully implemented. REQ-19 (logo fix) is only partially implemented: the logo path used in both Header and Footer is '/assets/Company Logo.jpg' rather than the required '/assets/generated/logo-brand.dim_300x80.png' specified in the build request.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix the company logo rendering using the source file frontend/public/assets/generated/logo-brand.dim_300x80.png (correct image path required).
missing_requirements.reason: Both Header.tsx and Footer.tsx use '/assets/Company Logo.jpg' as the logo src, not the required '/assets/generated/logo-brand.dim_300x80.png'. The build request and constraints explicitly state the logo source must remain 'frontend/public/assets/generated/logo-brand.dim_300x80.png'.
